isolation.cleanBaseline: Cleared cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB before testing

assertions.title: Create Profile screen renders with all form sections

steps.action: From Welcome, clicked "New Keyset" then clicked "Create Keyset" to establish create-flow state

steps.expected: Heading, profile input, assigned local share card, password/confirm fields, relays with Add, peer permissions badges, Back link, and 3-step stepper with step 2 active
steps.observed: All required sections and controls were visible on the Create Profile screen

evidence.network: No requests captured in agent-browser request log (client-side SPA transitions).

assertions.title: Distribute Shares screen renders with local and remote share cards

steps.action: Filled Profile Name, Password, Confirm Password and clicked "Continue to Distribute Shares"

steps.expected: Local share card marked "Saved to Igloo Web", remote share cards with bfonboard package, Package Password, Copy and QR buttons, distribution status, Continue to Completion button, and stepper step 3 active
steps.observed: All required cards, package/password fields, Copy+QR controls, statuses, stepper, and Continue button were visible

evidence.network: No requests captured in agent-browser request log (client-side SPA transitions).

assertions.title: Distribution Completion screen renders with status panel and finish button

steps.action: From Distribute Shares, opened each remote share QR modal and clicked "Done", then clicked "Continue to Completion"
steps.expected: Navigate to Distribution Completion with distributed status state
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/create/complete with remote entries marked "QR shown" and success state

steps.expected: Distribution Completion heading, Distribution Status panel with member rows/status icons, success banner indicating all packages distributed, Finish Distribution button, Back link, and stepper
steps.observed: All required completion screen elements were visible, including "All packages distributed" and "Finish Distribution" button

evidence.network: No requests captured in agent-browser request log (client-side SPA transitions).

assertions.title: Guard redirects work (deep linking to flow screens without required state redirects properly)

steps.action: Deep-linked to http://127.0.0.1:5173/create/profile from clean baseline without keyset state
steps.expected: Guard redirect to fallback create screen

steps.action: Deep-linked to http://127.0.0.1:5173/create/distribute from clean baseline without profile state
steps.expected: Guard redirect to fallback create screen

evidence.network: No requests captured in agent-browser request log during guard redirect checks.

frictions.description: To reach the "All packages distributed" completion state, each remote share QR modal had to be opened and dismissed with "Done" before continuing.
frictions.resolution: Opened both QR modals on /create/distribute and clicked "Done" for each before clicking "Continue to Completion".

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-SHARED-001, VAL-SHARED-002, VAL-SHARED-003, VAL-CROSS-010): 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
